==Biography==
Sergio Silva was born in Neiva, Colombia.

== Trivia ==
* Known for his good skills as mid laner.
* Won many amateur tournaments with teams created by him and his friends.
* His IGN comes from a teacher of him who was scolding him and wrote "Cotopaco" on the blackboard.

=== Individual Awards ===
* LLA Most Weekly MVPs in his role in the split (Opening 2019)
